scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/tripnest/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/tripnest
  set jcr:title{String} to "TripNest"
end
create service user tripnest-service-user with path system/tripnest

set ACL for tripnest-service-user
allow jcr:read on /content/tripnest
allow jcr:read on /content/wknd
end
